reason_for_decision: The article passes because it treats AI integration as a bounded systems-engineering problem with explicit governance, evaluation, and human-oversight requirements.
strengths: The article is strong on bounded use cases, data quality, and keeping oversight explicit rather than treating AI as generic automation.
It handles inference placement, monitoring, rollback, and auditability as lifecycle concerns instead of afterthoughts.
The procurement questions near the end make the piece practical for real program teams.
summary_assessment: This is a strong pass under the strict rubric. It is operationally grounded, non-promotional, and useful for responsible AI integration planning in security systems.
